name: opencode-orchestrator
description: OpenCode-native multi-agent control plane for server-first autonomous engineering workflows.
author: agnusdei1207

scripts.docker:build-all: docker compose run --rm dev && docker compose run --rm win-builder
scripts.docker:rust-dist: docker compose run --rm dev && (sudo chown -R $(id -u):$(id -g) bin/ 2>/dev/null || true)
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/index.js --platform=node --format=esm && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && mkdir -p dist/scripts && esbuild scripts/postinstall.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/scripts/postinstall.js --platform=node --format=esm --main-fields=module,main && esbuild scripts/preuninstall.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/scripts/preuninstall.js --platform=node --format=esm --main-fields=module,main
scripts.build:all: bun run build && bun run docker:rust-dist
scripts.test:all: bun run build && vitest run --reporter=verbose && echo '=== ALL TESTS PASSED ==='
scripts.release:patch: bun pm version patch && bun run build && bun run docker:rust-dist && bun run publish:token
scripts.release:minor: bun pm version minor && bun run build && bun run docker:rust-dist && bun run publish:token
scripts.release:major: bun pm version major && bun run build && bun run docker:rust-dist && bun run publish:token
scripts.reset:local: brew uninstall opencode 2>/dev/null; rm -rf ~/.config/opencode ~/.opencode ~/.local/share/opencode ~/.cache/opencode/node_modules/opencode-orchestrator && echo '=== Clean done ===' && brew install opencode && echo '{"plugin": ["opencode-orchestrator"], "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json"}' > ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json && echo '=== Reset (Dev) complete. Run: opencode ==='
scripts.reset:prod: brew uninstall opencode 2>/dev/null; rm -rf ~/.config/opencode ~/.opencode ~/.local/share/opencode ~/.cache/opencode/node_modules/opencode-orchestrator && echo '=== Clean done ===' && brew install opencode && echo '{"plugin": ["opencode-orchestrator"], "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json"}' > ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json && bun run cleanup:plugin && bun remove -g opencode-orchestrator && echo '=== Reset (Prod) complete. Run: opencode ==='
